steps.expected: HTTP 200 with new token in response, old token revoked in DB
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with {ok: true, token: '...', user: {...}}, old token has revoked_at timestamp set

steps.expected: GET /me with old token returns 401 AUTH_FAILED
steps.observed: GET /me with old token returned 401 {error: 'Invalid or revoked bearer token', code: 'AUTH_FAILED'}

steps.expected: Old token has revoked_at timestamp, new token active
steps.observed: Old token (ia-r2-api-94bc-token) has revoked_at='2026-03-03T09:41:14.142Z', new token (56c43e7f-...) has revoked_at=NULL

evidence.database:
SELECT id, token_hash, revoked_at FROM user_tokens WHERE user_id='ia-r2-api-94bc-user':
- ia-r2-api-94bc-token | fe7c64b75ffb67f09bdbd44a99c944164884162e310eb6857af7753071096675 | 2026-03-03T09:41:14.142Z (revoked)
- 56c43e7f-052f-4f55-a667-ed2fe6d94c95 | a9e878bb0a7249dc422532451cdd571aa1b8ce65c6e96cc3f8c0e9943fa5e3c2 | NULL (active)

steps.expected: HTTP 202/200 with {ok: true, message: 'Recovery email sent'}, login attempt created in DB
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with {ok: true, message: 'Recovery email sent'}, login_attempts table has new row with email, token_hash, expires_at, used=0

steps.expected: Same response to prevent user enumeration
steps.observed: HTTP 200 with identical {ok: true, message: 'Recovery email sent'} - no user enumeration possible

steps.expected: login_attempts table contains new row for ia-r2-api-94bc@example.com with used=0, future expires_at
steps.observed: Latest login attempt: c0fd3822-5f0f-41e6-8917-7ce8e03ecfd2 | ia-r2-api-94bc@example.com | expires_at=2026-03-03T09:57:02.520Z | used=0

steps.action: Verify existing shares remain accessible after recovery flow
steps.expected: User's shares persist in database for post-recovery access
steps.observed: Share a19ce184-9f76-459b-a16d-1ca1edc4a241 (slug: share-5vnv3) owned by ia-r2-api-94bc-user persists in DB

evidence.database:
Recent login_attempts for ia-r2-api-94bc@example.com:
- c0fd3822-5f0f-41e6-8917-7ce8e03ecfd2 | expires_at=2026-03-03T09:57:02.520Z | used=0
- 15764ee6-8828-4ca6-8dac-c3b088652e94 | expires_at=2026-03-03T09:56:34.990Z | used=0

User shares:
- a19ce184-9f76-459b-a16d-1ca1edc4a241 | share-5vnv3 | owner_id=ia-r2-api-94bc-user

summary: Both VAL-AUTH-005 and VAL-AUTH-006 assertions pass. Token rotation endpoint (/auth/rotate-token) correctly revokes old tokens and issues new ones. Account recovery endpoint (/auth/recover) creates login attempts and prevents user enumeration. Previous implementation blockers are resolved.
